typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		country as string,
		country_code as string,
		continent as string,
		population as integer,
		indicator as string,
		daily_count as integer,
		date as date,
		rate_14_day as double,
		source as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> casesdeathssrc
source(output(
		country as string,
		country_code_2_digit as string,
		country_code_3_digit as string,
		continent as string,
		population as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> ctrylkp
casesdeathssrc filter(continent == 'Europe' && not(isNull(country_code))) ~> fltreu
fltreu select(mapColumn(
		country,
		country_code,
		population,
		indicator,
		daily_count,
		source,
		each(match(name=='date'),
			'reported'+'_date' = $$)
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: false,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: false) ~> selcolumn
selcolumn pivot(groupBy(country,
		country_code,
		population,
		source,
		reported_date),
	pivotBy(indicator, ['confirmedcases', 'deaths']),
	count = sum(daily_count),
	columnNaming: '$V_$N',
	lateral: true) ~> Pivotcolmns
Pivotcolmns, ctrylkp lookup(Pivotcolmns@country == ctrylkp@country,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'auto')~> lkpctry
lkpctry select(mapColumn(
		country = Pivotcolmns@country,
		country_code,
		population = Pivotcolmns@population,
		source,
		reported_date,
		confirmedcases_count,
		deaths_count,
		country = ctrylkp@country,
		country_code_2_digit,
		country_code_3_digit
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> slcsync
slcsync sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:['cases.csv'],
	truncate: true,
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> casesdeath

source(output(
		country as string,
		indicator as string,
		date as date,
		year_week as string,
		value as double,
		source as string,
		url as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> hospitaladmission
source(output(
		country as string,
		country_code_2_digit as string,
		country_code_3_digit as string,
		continent as string,
		population as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> countrylkp
source(output(
		date_key as date,
		date as date,
		year as short,
		month as short,
		day as short,
		day_name as string,
		day_of_year as short,
		week_of_month as short,
		week_of_year as short,
		month_name as string,
		year_month as integer,
		year_week as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> Datedim
hospitaladmission select(mapColumn(
		country,
		indicator,
		reported_date = date,
		reported_year_week = year_week,
		value,
		source
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> selflds
ctryselect split(indicator=='Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k'||indicator=='Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k',
	disjoint: false) ~> weekly@(Weekly, Daily)
selflds, countrylkp lookup(selflds@country == countrylkp@country,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'auto')~> eulkp
eulkp select(mapColumn(
		country = selflds@country,
		indicator,
		reported_date,
		reported_year_week,
		value,
		source,
		country = countrylkp@country,
		country_code_2_digit,
		country_code_3_digit,
		population
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> ctryselect
Datedim derive(reported_year_week = toString(year) + '-W' + lpad(toString(week_of_year), 2, '0')) ~> yearweek
yearweek aggregate(groupBy(reported_year_week),
	Start_date = min(date),
		End_date = max(date)) ~> datstrtend
weekly@Weekly, datstrtend join(weekly@Weekly@reported_year_week == datstrtend@reported_year_week,
	joinType:'inner',
	broadcast: 'auto')~> joinweekdtsrt
joinweekdtsrt pivot(groupBy(country,
		country_code_2_digit,
		country_code_3_digit,
		population,
		weekly@Weekly@reported_year_week,
		Start_date,
		End_date,
		source),
	pivotBy(indicator, ['Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k', 'Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k']),
	count = sum(value),
	columnNaming: '$V_$N',
	lateral: false) ~> pvtweekly
weekly@Daily pivot(groupBy(country,
		country_code_2_digit,
		country_code_3_digit,
		reported_date,
		population,
		source),
	pivotBy(indicator, ['Daily hospital occupancy', 'Daily ICU occupancy']),
	Count = sum(value),
	columnNaming: '$V_$N',
	lateral: false) ~> pvtdly
pvtweekly sort(desc(reported_year_week, true),
	asc(country, true),
	caseInsensitive: true) ~> ssrtwkly
pvtdly sort(desc(reported_date, true),
	asc(country, true),
	caseInsensitive: true) ~> srtdly
ssrtwkly select(mapColumn(
		country,
		country_code_2_digit,
		country_code_3_digit,
		population,
		reported_year_week,
		source,
		{ hospital admissions per 100k_count} = {Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k_count},
		{ ICU admissions per 100k_count} = {Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k_count}
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> sltwklyfnl
srtdly select(mapColumn(
		country,
		country_code_2_digit,
		country_code_3_digit,
		reported_date,
		population,
		source,
		{hospital occupancy_Count} = {Daily hospital occupancy_Count},
		{ICU occupancy_Count} = {Daily ICU occupancy_Count}
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> sltdlyfnl
sltwklyfnl sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> weeklysink
sltdlyfnl sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> dlysnk
